_usage: RF02 Version Lock template for RP01 ESOL + L05 Extended Descriptors. Run rp01_esol.m to generate lock_snapshot.json with actual values in result/runs/<ts>/.
_note: This file defines the RF02 metadata template and the single source of truth for rf03_criteria. rp01_esol.m reads rf03_criteria from this file. Runtime scalar results are written to metrics.json; runtime environment fields are written to lock_snapshot.json via emk.setup.lockfile().

paper.title: ESOL: Estimating Aqueous Solubility Directly from Molecular Structure

models.A: Delaney original 4-feature: LogP + MolWt + NumRotatableBonds + AromaticProportion
models.B: L05 extended 9-feature: Model A + TPSA + NumHDonors + NumHAcceptors + FractionCSP3 + QED
